metadata.title: Quick Site Takeover with Perfect Timing and Clean Headshots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how smooth movement and sharp aim secure this fast double kill. Timing was key to catching the opponents unaware.
What’s your go-to approach for site pushes in VALORANT?
Share your tips and favorite strategies below!

Drop your favorite site push plays in the comments!
